title: ItemOverflow
description: A mod that adds cosmetic, technical blocks to complete your builds
body:
# ItemOverflow

**For versions 1.16.5 and 1.12.2**

This mod adds various aesthetic blocks and items to the game that add detail to your builds. The elements added to this mod are the small details that aren't implemented into most decoration mods.

Rather than focusing on furniture and obvious details, ItemOverflow features smaller, technical props that bring character to your builds. ItemOverflow features a selection of blocks such as light fixtures, TVs, computers, appliances, and more!
